taekwondo.name: Taekwondo
taekwondo.description: A timeless Korean martial art that builds discipline, balance and confidence. Kids and adult groups.
taekwondo.longDescription: Korea's national martial art. Builds discipline, confidence and reflexes. Suitable for every age and level.

boxing.name: Boxing & Kickboxing
boxing.description: High-tempo, mixed training that develops conditioning and reflexes.
boxing.longDescription: Conditioning, power and self-defense combined. For beginners and experienced alike.

archery.name: Traditional Archery
archery.description: Traditional 'tirendaz' technique with focus on posture, breath and concentration.
archery.longDescription: Carry on the Turkish archery tradition. Focus, patience and technique.

gymnastics.name: Kids Gymnastics
gymnastics.description: Foundational gymnastics, balance and flexibility for ages 4–14.
gymnastics.longDescription: Playful gymnastics classes that support kids' motor development.

pilates.name: Reformer Pilates
pilates.description: Women-only full-body work on the reformer, sold as 8-session packages.
pilates.longDescription: Reformer pilates with physiotherapist Beyza Erdaş. 8-session packages, 2 sessions per week.

story.title: WHO WE ARE
paragraphs: Samimi Sports Club is a small but heartfelt sports community founded in Ankara Yenimahalle Demet, where members are treated like family.
Under one roof we offer five disciplines: Taekwondo, Boxing & Kickboxing, Traditional Archery, Kids Gymnastics and women-only Reformer Pilates — each led by certified, experienced trainers.

From children to adults, beginners to advanced, we built a place that fits every age and level. Our goal: bring healthy living, disciplined training and a welcoming sports culture under the same roof.

values.title: OUR VALUES
values.subtitle: Three principles that make us who we are.

samimiyet.title: WARMTH
samimiyet.subtitle: A Family-Like Community
samimiyet.text: True to our name ("Samimi" means warm, sincere), we offer a personal atmosphere. Everyone feels at home; trainers and members know each other by name.

uzmanlik.title: EXPERTISE
uzmanlik.subtitle: Experienced, Certified Trainers
uzmanlik.text: Every discipline is led by certified, experienced trainers. Reformer pilates with a physiotherapist, martial arts with seasoned coaches — quality is non-negotiable.

cesitlilik.title: DIVERSITY
cesitlilik.subtitle: Five Disciplines, One Place
cesitlilik.text: Taekwondo, Boxing & Kickboxing, Traditional Archery, Kids Gymnastics and Reformer Pilates. Five disciplines under one roof — something for every member of the family.

cta.title: Come Meet Us
cta.description: Tour the studio, ask your questions, plan a trial session together.

location.title: HOW TO GET HERE
location.transportText: On Sami Efendi Avenue in Demet. Parking available nearby; short ride from Yenimahalle center by public transport.

video.title: Welcome to our studio

main-hall.title: MAIN HALL
main-hall.subtitle: Martial Arts Area
main-hall.text: Dedicated flooring and equipment for taekwondo, boxing and kickboxing. Spacious room, high ceiling, professional gear.

archery.title: ARCHERY AREA
archery.subtitle: Traditional Turkish Archery
archery.text: A safe shooting range purpose-built for traditional Turkish archery. All equipment is provided on site.

gymnastics.title: KIDS GYMNASTICS AREA
gymnastics.subtitle: Safe Space for Ages 4–14
gymnastics.text: A safe, colourful and playful gymnastics area for ages 4–14. Mats, ropes and balance equipment.

pilates.title: REFORMER PILATES STUDIO
pilates.subtitle: Women Only
pilates.text: A women-only reformer pilates studio with professional reformer machines and a bright atmosphere.

locker.title: LOCKER ROOMS
locker.subtitle: Comfortable and Personal
locker.text: Comfortable locker rooms with personal lockers.
